last_session_summary: Parser is feature-complete per approved grammar. Implemented: if/else, nested blocks, full expression precedence chain (assignment, logical OR/AND, equality, comparison, additive, multiplicative, unary, postfix, call). Refactored monolithic parser into modular architecture (nodes, token_stream, expressions, declarations, statements, recovery, parser). Fixed parse_return_statement span inconsistency. No while/for/break/continue defined in LANGUAGE_SPEC.md.
last_commit: refactor(parser): split monolithic parser into modular architecture
